findings.title: Doctor router frontmatter grants non-existent mk-spec-memory code-graph, ccc, and advisor tools
findings.recommendation: Change code_graph/detect_changes/ccc entries to `mcp__mk_code_index__*` and advisor entries to `mcp__mk_skill_advisor__*`, matching the extracted server ownership.

findings.title: Skill-advisor route manifest points advisor_* tools at mk-spec-memory instead of mk-skill-advisor
findings.recommendation: Replace `mcp__mk_spec_memory__advisor_*` with `mcp__mk_skill_advisor__advisor_*` and update the stale ownership comment at line 20.

findings.title: Memory manage command still documents ccc_* calls under mk-spec-memory
findings.recommendation: Move `ccc_status`, `ccc_reindex`, and `ccc_feedback` references in frontmatter and examples to `mcp__mk_code_index__*`.

findings.title: VS Code MCP config was renamed but still bypasses the launcher path used by other runtime configs
findings.recommendation: Either document `.vscode/mcp.json` as intentionally direct-to-dist, or align it to `.opencode/bin/mk-spec-memory-launcher.cjs` like `.mcp.json` and the four documented runtimes.

findings.title: Plan document remains the scaffold template, not the shipped rename plan
findings.recommendation: Replace the template placeholders and generic phases with the actual rename surfaces, verification plan, and rollback details.

findings.title: Spec metadata still says Draft, old 027 packet pointer, scaffold branch, and 10% completion after shipment
findings.recommendation: Refresh frontmatter continuity, metadata status, branch, and completion fields to the 026/017 shipped packet state.

findings.title: Spec acceptance criteria names the new prefix as the string that should be absent
findings.recommendation: Change REQ-004 and SC-001 to assert zero active `mcp__spec_kit_memory__` references, with documented exclusions for historical audit files.

findings.title: Graph metadata still marks the shipped packet as planned
findings.recommendation: Regenerate or patch graph metadata so graph traversal and resume surfaces report the shipped/completed state and actual key files.

findings.title: Resource map omits committed `.mcp.json` and `.vscode/mcp.json` changes from runtime-config coverage
findings.recommendation: Add the two committed MCP config surfaces or explicitly classify them as adjacent/non-gating surfaces.

findings.title: Implementation summary still reports strict validation as pending despite tasks and current validation showing pass
findings.recommendation: Replace the pending row with the actual strict validation evidence, or make tasks and summary agree on the final verification state.

findings.title: Resource-map occurrence counts are internally inconsistent
findings.recommendation: Reconcile the stated total of 86 files with the operational 61 plus historical 54+/90+ claims so the active-vs-historical split is auditable.
